name: resourcing-control-tower
description: Offline Windows desktop Resource Assignation System built with React and Electron.
author: Resource Command Center

scripts.electron:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && electron ."
scripts.dist: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
